items.name: LV Designer Monogram Tie
items.description:
Flex elite style with the LV Monogram Tie — subtle yet powerful, the iconic pattern speaks volumes without saying a word. A must-have accessory that levels up any fit.

💎 Signature Flex – LV monogram, detailed and unmistakably elite
🎩 Versatile Style – Fits business, streetwear, or casual luxury looks
⚡ Statement Piece – Elevates your avatar with effortless drip
🪡 Style Tip: Pair with formal fits or layered street looks for maximum impact
